title: althaea ambigua
intro: Althaea ambigua, also known as the marshmallow plant, is a perennial herb native to Europe and Western Asia, belonging to the mallow family (Malvaceae). The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its mucilaginous properties, which make it an effective demulcent. The medicinal properties of Althaea ambigua include soothing and calming irritated mucous membranes, reducing inflammation, and aiding in the healing of wounds and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or extract, and is often used to treat various health issues such as digestive problems, sore throats, and skin irritations.
